text: Well, the colonoscopy—do I need to prepare for it? Yes, because you actually need to arrive with a completely clean colon, so you'll have to drink a solution that will make you go to the toilet and empty your colon. You'll also need to follow a low-residue diet so that it's easier to evacuate. So yes, it's an exam that requires preparation.
